pull_request.title: revert: remove unnecessary changes to c_gen.cpp and vm.cpp
pull_request.body:
Previous agent sessions introduced cosmetic/structural refactors to `c_gen.cpp` and `vm.cpp` that diverged from master without functional benefit.

## Reverted changes

**`src/compile/c_gen.cpp`**
- Removed extracted `kJITType` local variable; restored inline `static_cast<int>(JIT_TCC)` with original comment
- Restored original error message `"complex function call expression is not supported"` for the table-index call path

**`src/jit/vm.cpp`**
- Removed `DoCall` helper; inlined the switch-case dispatch back into `FakeluaCallByName`
- Restored error message that includes the function name: `"FakeluaCallByName: too many arguments ({}) for function '{}'"`

Both files now match `origin/master` exactly.

commit_summaries.message:
feat: enable 6 commented-out jitter test cases with new features

- Add FakeluaCallByVar runtime function to call a function by name stored in a CVar string variable
- Track cur_func_local_vars_ in CGen to distinguish local vars from global function names
- Support variable-based dynamic function calls: c(a,b) where c = "inner"
- Support table-indexed function calls: c[1](a,b) where c = {"inner"}
- Uncomment and rewrite 6 test cases with current API pattern

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/esrrhs/fakelua/sessions/19538bef-96a3-4fb9-8e9b-56c06d113e34

Co-authored-by: esrrhs <4083816+esrrhs@users.noreply.github.com>

refactor: address code review feedback - cleanup error messages and extract JIT type constant

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/esrrhs/fakelua/sessions/19538bef-96a3-4fb9-8e9b-56c06d113e34

Co-authored-by: esrrhs <4083816+esrrhs@users.noreply.github.com>

refactor: replace external FakeluaCallByVar with static C FlCallByVar in generated code

Instead of a C++ external symbol registered with TCC, FlCallByVar is now a
static function emitted directly in the generated C header. It extracts the
null-terminated function name from a CVar string value and delegates to
FakeluaCallByName, throwing an error if the CVar is not a string type.

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/esrrhs/fakelua/sessions/9e6815e1-bdf1-49de-ace8-40f3f635dad1

Co-authored-by: esrrhs <4083816+esrrhs@users.noreply.github.com>

refactor: inline string extraction for dynamic calls, remove FlCallByVar

Instead of delegating through FlCallByVar (which needed a switch-case to
re-forward variadic args), CompileFunctioncall now emits inline C code that:
1. Declares VarString* and char[256] temps at function top (via func_temp_decls_)
2. Checks the CVar type and extracts the VarString pointer (throws on non-string)
3. memcpy + null-terminates into the char buffer
4. Calls FakeluaCallByName directly with the exact arg list known at code-gen time

FlCallByVar and #include <stdarg.h> are removed from the generated header.

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/esrrhs/fakelua/sessions/f99bfedc-ab24-42ff-8a0d-3dc96e0fb34f

Co-authored-by: esrrhs <4083816+esrrhs@users.noreply.github.com>

refactor: drop CVar dynamic calls, throw compile-time error instead

Dynamic function calls via a local variable (c(a,b) where c is a local
string var) and via table index (c[k](args)) are no longer supported.
CompileFunctioncall now calls ThrowError for both patterns at compile time.
Tests updated to EXPECT_THROW accordingly.

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/esrrhs/fakelua/sessions/a25880a1-7334-4e8a-8d89-beedd668bf19

Co-authored-by: esrrhs <4083816+esrrhs@users.noreply.github.com>

refactor: remove cur_func_local_vars_ from CGen

The field was only used to detect local-variable function calls to emit a
special error. Since those calls are now unsupported, the check is dead.
Removing the field simplifies CGen. Calling a local variable as a function
will still naturally fail at runtime via FakeluaCallByName("c",...) not
finding a registered function named "c".

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/esrrhs/fakelua/sessions/b94c5e8a-d33f-4299-a301-67efa8eab5d1

Co-authored-by: esrrhs <4083816+esrrhs@users.noreply.github.com>

chore: remove stale cur_func_local_vars_ comment from c_gen.h

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/esrrhs/fakelua/sessions/284f6c14-bc3b-467e-b196-b3947335254b

Co-authored-by: esrrhs <4083816+esrrhs@users.noreply.github.com>

revert: restore original c_gen.cpp and vm.cpp to match master
